channel.title: Sanaz'd Personal Website
channel.description: Recent content on Sanaz'd Personal Website

item.title: My First Post
item.description: Welcome to my Hugo site! This is my first post.

item.title: About Me
item.description: I am a passionate telecom and network engineer with a strong interest in Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) and Software-Defined Networking (SDN). During my recent research at Ghent University – imec, I focused on latency-aware topology discovery in SDN-based TSNs, which are essential for real-time communications in critical applications such as healthcare, industrial automation, and transportation.
